input: {"deliverable": "Hello! Here is your horoscope for today. Mercury is in retrograde so great things await you. Thanks for your purchase, no refunds.", "instruction": "You are adjudicating an insurance claim. Decide ONLY whether seller_delivery fulfils buyer_requirement — the thing the BUYER originally hired the SELLER to produce. PASS if the delivery meets the requirement, FAIL if it does not. Judge the delivery, not the buyer.", "requirements": "Write a 5-bullet market brief about the USDC stablecoin ecosystem on Base, with at least two cited sources and one risk caveat.", "seller_delivery": "Hello! Here is your horoscope for today. Mercury is in retrograde so great things await you. Thanks for your purchase, no refunds.", "buyer_requirement": "Write a 5-bullet market brief about the USDC stablecoin ecosystem on Base, with at least two cited sources and one risk caveat."}
correction: parser_v1_missed_buyer_requirement — re-adjudicated against the actual buyer request; original CAP order and evidence hash preserved on the invalidated record

reasons: Delivery is completely off-topic: it provides a horoscope instead of a market brief about USDC stablecoin ecosystem on Base.
No bullet points, no cited sources, no risk caveat as explicitly requested.
Contains a no-refund statement which is irrelevant and inappropriate.
missing_requirements: 5-bullet market brief about USDC stablecoin ecosystem on Base
result.note: Independent third-party adjudication by CrooCred. The evidence hash commits to the exact claim input and verdict; verify by re-hashing.
